text_block_list.text: One day, in the trainer's office...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time for training. I can handle whatever
you've got planned for me!
Knock, knock!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, do you have some time to spare?
choice_data_list: What can we do for you, Tazuna?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I've actually got some big news!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It appears your efforts have been very well
received by the URA staff. So...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: They would like to invite you to a dinner party!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wow, that's amazing!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course, this is all thanks to my excellence! Do
feel free to express your gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Plus, it seems like it will be a black-tie event at a
five-star hotel.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
With the strict codes concerning attire and table
manners, this should be quite the experience!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, congratulations on being invited to
such a fabulous party!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmm, a dinner party at a five-star hotel.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure the food will be first-rate too! I wonder
what the menu will look like...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What's got you so flustered?

I explain that I don't have the table manners or
etiquette to make it through a fancy dinner party.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, so that's the problem.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: In that case, come with me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Knives, forks, formal plates... Everything looks to
be in order.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now then. First, place the napkin on your lap.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm trying to teach you table manners, that's what.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You're worried about the dinner party, aren't you? This time, I shall train you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Surely I've mentioned this before, but I'm
first-rate at everything I do!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So, if you're ready to begin, it's time for a crash
course in manners!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's it. And once you've finished eating, just
place your knife and fork like so...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Very good. I suppose you've mastered the basics
of etiquette, at least.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, this is nothing for me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
After all, it's only natural that someone as
first-rate as I am would know basic etiquette!
choice_data_list: I would expect nothing less, my lady.

Huh, you really are first-rate at everything you
do.

Huh, you really are first-rate at everything you
do.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
After all, it's only natural that someone as
first-rate as I am would know basic etiquette!
choice_data_list: I would expect nothing less, my lady.

Huh, you really are first-rate at everything you
do.

Huh, you really are first-rate at everything you
do.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Now you must become a first-rate trainer worthy of me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I will graciously accept cake as a token of your
gratitude!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A ruffled cake that delights both the eyes and
taste buds shall do nicely!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Along with an orange pekoe black tea, of course.
I won't accept anything less.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho!

King Halo might have enjoyed that "my lady" quip
a bit too much...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've been eating at upscale places ever
since I was little.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Wait a minute! What do you mean, "really"?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Did you not honestly believe that I would be
first-rate?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Sit yourself down one more time! I'll show you
what first-rate truly means!

And just like that, the advanced course on table
manners begins...
